## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership between Plutaro and GrowthX Labs for AI-driven content marketing automation.](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Misalignment on pricing/engagement model: GrowthX offers fixed-price contracts ($9k/mo, 12-mo min), while Plutaro seeks performance-based pricing](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in organic content automation to drive traffic/leads; Plutaro more interested in end-to-end sales automation](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Potential future collaboration on client communication automation tool development, though not an immediate priority for GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Plutaro's Business Model & Needs

  - [Dev agency offering "Silicon Valley Grade products" at lower costs](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Team of 6, looking to scale via automation rather than headcount](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Exploring sales automation tools (e.g. Clay) and potential partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [Open to moving quickly with right partner, but prioritizing capital efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)

### GrowthX's Offering & Approach

  - [Specializes in organic content automation for top-of-funnel growth](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Leverages AI workflows built on experience from major tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=580.0)
  - [Pricing: $9k/month, 12-month minimum contract](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [High demand allows selectivity in client partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [Focus on content creation, leaving distribution/conversion to clients](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=403.0)

### Pricing Model Mismatch

  - [Plutaro seeks performance-based pricing to align incentives and reduce risk](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [GrowthX uses fixed pricing due to high demand and investment in robust team](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [GrowthX can't guarantee specific results as they don't control full funnel](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)

### Potential Future Collaboration

  - [Simon proposed partnering on client communication automation tool](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [GrowthX interested but not immediate priority due to focus on core offering](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Possibility to revisit in future if priorities align](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Simon to reach out if organic content needs become more urgent](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1299.0)
  - [GrowthX to keep Plutaro's automation tool partnership idea in mind for future](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Both parties open to reconnecting when timing/fit may be better aligned](https://fathom.video/share/L_8bsdykN1s6zjxnVjXNZvmM1eDf3jbo?tab=summary&timestamp=1288.0)
